ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ad_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the campaign belongs to */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad campaign */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad format type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main objective of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_campaigns_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES format_types ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the client belongs to */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person for the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "website" TEXT /* Client's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad performance entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the performance metrics belong to */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical zone */,
  "cluster" INTEGER /* Cluster ID for the ad campaign */,
  "subcluster" INTEGER /* Subcluster ID for the ad campaign */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain where the ad was displayed */,
  "format_loads" INTEGER /* Number of ad format loads */,
  "impressions" REAL /* Number of ad impressions */,
  "format_fill_rate" REAL /* Ad format fill rate */,
  "viewability_rate" REAL /* Ad viewability rate */,
  "efficiency_rate" REAL /* Ad efficiency rate */,
  "cpm" REAL /* Cost per thousand impressions (CPM) */,
  "clicks" REAL /* Number of ad clicks */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of the campaign */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit from the campaign */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES geographical_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical zone */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the zone belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the zone */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the zone */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the geographical zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., account manager, analyst, client) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for security and audit purposes */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES ad_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_types" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad format type */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad format type (e.g., display, video, mobile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ad format type */,
  "compatible_devices" TEXT /* JSON field to store devices compatible with the ad format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Glamour, Movies & Television, Autos) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
